alerts.title: Life Of James Watt muirhead 1858 John Murray Portraits Woodcuts Antique

alerts.title: Antique Book 1891 Alphonse Daudet Tartarin de Tarascon French book

alerts.title: Antique 1894 Shakespeare Leather Bound Book - Vintage Decor

alerts.title: The Boys Own Annual 1894 to 1895
alerts.image_reason: Boy's Own Annual, 1894 per interior masthead. Title page shows 'Boy's Own Paper' Office, London. Colour frontispiece plate present. Plain boards but genuine Victorian periodical annual with strong collector appeal.

alerts.title: 1884 Lane & Field Antiquarian Illustrated Natural History Book
alerts.image_reason: Title page: Rev. J.G. Wood, Natural History Rambles: Lane and Field, SPCK, 1884. Navy pictorial boards with gilt, botanical illustrations inside. Prize plate 1887 adds provenance charm.
